---
title: "kuwait_diagnostic_delay"
format: html
---

```{r}
#load packages 
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

kuwait <- read.csv("kuwait_merged_final.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# --- Shared data prep ---
kuwait_plot <- kuwait %>%
  filter(Cyrius_phenotype != "unknown",
         !is.na(diagnostic_delay_months)) %>%
  mutate(
    Cyrius_phenotype = factor(Cyrius_phenotype, levels = c("NM", "IM", "PM", "UM")),
    case_id = row_number()
  )

# --- Plot 1: Lollipop ---
p1 <- ggplot(kuwait_plot, aes(x = diagnostic_delay_months,
                               y = reorder(as.character(Sample), diagnostic_delay_months),
                               colour = Cyrius_phenotype)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = diagnostic_delay_months,
                   yend = reorder(as.character(Sample), diagnostic_delay_months)),
               linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey70") +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("NM" = "#2c3e50", "IM" = "#2980b9", "PM" = "#e74c3c", "UM" = "#27ae60"),
    name = "Metaboliser\nphenotype"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 48, 12)) +
  labs(
    title = "Diagnostic delay by CYP2D6 metaboliser phenotype",
    subtitle = "Kuwait cohort — ALS cases",
    x = "Time to diagnosis (months)",
    y = "ALS case"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# --- Plot 2: ECDF ---
kuwait_ecdf <- kuwait_plot %>%
  arrange(diagnostic_delay_months) %>%
  mutate(
    n_total = n(),
    rank = row_number(),
    prop_undiagnosed = 1 - (rank / n_total)
  )

time_zero <- tibble(diagnostic_delay_months = 0, prop_undiagnosed = 1)
final_drop <- tibble(diagnostic_delay_months = c(48, 48), prop_undiagnosed = c(1/18, 0))
plot_data <- bind_rows(time_zero, kuwait_ecdf, final_drop)

p2 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = diagnostic_delay_months, y = prop_undiagnosed)) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 0.9, colour = "#2166AC") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "Diagnostic delay (months)",
    breaks = seq(0, 48, by = 12),
    limits = c(0, 54)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Proportion undiagnosed",
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Time to ALS diagnosis",
    subtitle = "Kuwait cohort — descriptive only (n=18)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

# --- Combine and save ---
p1 + p2 + plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

ggsave("kuwait_diagnostic_delay_combined.png", width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
